summary: Overrides | Session | Verify Page UI Elements and Column Headers
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the Overrides tile on the home page or from the sidebar navigation
Then the user lands on the "Overrides" page
And the user should see "Overrides" in the header
And the user should see "Session" and "Playback" tabs right next to Overrides header
And the user should see "+Create Override" button below the header
And the user should see "Search" box display on the right side of the screen
And the user should see "View" button display on the right side of the screen
And the user should see a table with the following column names:
"ID", "Okta ID", "Client Type", "Experience", "Features, and "Actions"

steps.action: *When* the user clicks on the Overrides tile on the home page or from the sidebar navigation
